tickets.title: Database connection timeout in production
tickets.description: The main analytics dashboard is failing to load because the connection to the read-replica database is timing out after 30 seconds.

tickets.title: Redis cluster memory usage at 95%
tickets.description: Alert triggered for the production Redis cluster. Eviction policies are kicking in but memory is still climbing.

tickets.title: Mobile app crashes on checkout
tickets.description: iOS users on version 3.2.1 are reporting immediate crashes when tapping the Pay Now button.

tickets.title: Stripe webhook signature validation failing
tickets.description: Payment success webhooks from Stripe are being rejected by our API due to invalid signatures. Revenue is not being recognized.

tickets.title: Update SSL certificates for internal tools
tickets.description: The wildcart cert for *.internal.company.com expires in 14 days. Need to rotate this across all load balancers.
